styleGuide.approach: Painterly pixel art — chunky but expressive, 2-3px outlines
paletteConstraints: Dark teal/ocean background (#0c1a1a to #132626) — icons must pop against this
Warm sand/amber highlights (#f0a050, #c8b090) for organic materials
All icons should have slight warm ambient light as if lit by tropical sun or campfire
composition: Single object, centered, filling ~80% of the frame
Slight 3/4 top-down perspective (like looking at items on the ground)
Subtle drop shadow on bottom edge for depth
No background — transparent PNG with optional subtle glow matching phase color
consistency: Same lighting direction (top-left) across all icons
Natural, weathered, handmade feel — nothing looks factory-produced
Tropical island color temperature — warm, slightly sun-bleached

phaseTinting.bare_hands: Sandy, muted tones (#c8b090). Raw, unprocessed look.
phaseTinting.fire: Warm amber/orange (#f0a050). Charred edges, smoke wisps.
phaseTinting.stone: Cool grey-blue (#a0a8b8). Sharp edges, flaked surfaces.

generationWorkflow: 3. Use img2img / style-ref from approved base to generate 'derived' icons
4. Generate standalone icons (no chain) in category batches
5. Final pass: ensure consistent lighting, outline weight, and saturation

icons.description: Mature coconut with rough brown husk, fibrous texture visible. Slight green tinge at the stem end.
Ragged chunk of brown coconut husk, fibrous strands pulling apart. Same coconut color/texture as coconut icon but clearly torn open.
icons.chainNote: Same coconut but ripped apart — show the fibrous interior

icons.description: Pale, smooth driftwood branch with knots. Salt-bleached grey-tan color, slightly curved.
Large dark-barked log, freshly cut end visible with rings. Much bigger and darker than driftwood — tropical hardwood.
Same large log but with blackened, charred interior hollow. Orange ember glow at the charred edges. Exterior bark still visible.
icons.chainNote: Same log as large_log but interior burned black with ember glow

icons.description: A dense, black lump of charcoal with subtle wood grain texture. Matte black surface with faint orange-red glow at cracks, as if still warm inside.
icons.use: Inventory, fuel for cooking and firing
icons.chainNote: Product of slow-burning large logs — same dark tones as charred_log but smaller, chunkier

icons.description: Smooth hollowed-out log shaped into a boat hull. Tool marks visible. Same wood tone as large_log but refined.
icons.chainNote: Same log, now scraped smooth and shaped into a hull form

icons.description: Flat, rounded grey stone with subtle warm tones. Smooth from water erosion. Palm-sized.
Brownish-grey flint-like stone with waxy sheen. Conchoidal fracture surface visible. Slightly translucent at thin edges.
Thin, sharp-edged stone flake with visible bulb of percussion. Same chert color as chert icon. Concentric ripple marks on surface.
icons.chainNote: A sharp flake struck from the chert nodule — same color, thinner, sharper

icons.description: Elongated pressure-flaked blade, razor-sharp edges with fine serrations. Same chert material. Longer and more refined than stone_flake.
icons.chainNote: A refined, elongated version of the stone_flake — same material, more worked

icons.description: Glossy black volcanic glass with sharp edges. Deep purple-black with glassy reflections. Dramatically different from chert.
Single bright green palm frond with visible midrib and leaflets. Fresh, vibrant green.
Handful of golden-brown dried grass blades, tied loosely. Sun-bleached straw color.
Loose tangle of coarse brown-green fibers, rough and unprocessed. Stringy, irregular strands.
Same fibers as rough_fiber but now pale tan, straighter, and stiffer. Clearly dried out and more uniform.
icons.chainNote: Same fibers, lighter color, straighter — dried version of rough_fiber

icons.description: Tightly twisted two-ply cord, same tan fiber material. Neat spiral twist pattern. Coiled in a small loop.
icons.use: Inventory, key crafting ingredient in many recipes
icons.chainNote: The dried fibers now twisted into cord — same color, twisted structure

icons.description: A small silvery-blue tropical fish with yellow accents. Alive-looking, slight curve as if just caught. Specific species: a small wrasse or damselfish.

icons.object: Cooked small fish on a leaf
icons.description: The SAME small fish species as small_fish, now golden-brown and grilled. Sitting on a green leaf. Char marks, slight steam wisp.
icons.chainNote: Same fish species, now cooked golden-brown with char marks and steam

icons.description: A substantial silvery fish — a trevally or small tuna. Clearly bigger than small_fish. Muscular body, forked tail.
The SAME large fish species, grilled whole on a banana leaf. Golden crust, steam rising. Bigger portion than cooked_fish.
icons.chainNote: Same fish species as large_fish, cooked — bigger than cooked_fish

icons.description: A reddish-brown shore crab with claws raised. Compact body, 8 legs visible. Lively pose.
The SAME crab, now bright red-orange from cooking. Same pose but cooked color. Slight steam. Shell cracked slightly.
icons.chainNote: Same crab turned bright red from cooking, shell slightly cracked

icons.description: A small conch-type spiral shell, peach-pink with white highlights. Smooth, polished by waves.
A big conch shell, same spiral type as shell but much larger. Deep pink interior visible. Impressive, trophy-like.
icons.chainNote: Same shell species, scaled up significantly — show the pink interior

icons.description: A short necklace or strand of small polished shells threaded on a natural fiber cord. Decorative, handmade feel. Five shells spaced along a curved cord.
icons.use: Recipe icon for Shell Beads crafting (morale boost)
icons.chainNote: Same small spiral shells as 'shell', but multiple arranged on a string — decorative craft product

icons.description: A green bamboo cane segment with visible nodes/joints. Fresh-cut, bright green with pale yellow at the nodes.
A thin, sharp bamboo splinter/strip. Same green color as bamboo_cane. Pale interior visible, sharp edge.
icons.chainNote: A thin strip split from the bamboo cane — same color, sharper

icons.description: A few small brown seeds in an open palm-leaf pouch. Earthy, organic look. Various sizes.
A knobby brown root, freshly dug — dirt still clinging. Similar to a wild yam. Earthy brown.
Same root vegetable, now split open showing golden-orange cooked interior. Char marks on skin, steaming.
icons.chainNote: Same root, split open and roasted — golden interior, charred skin

icons.description: A small purple-brown taro corm with stubby roots. Compact, bulb-like. Distinctive purple tinge.
Large taro root, same purple-brown as taro_corm but bigger. Cross-section would show white-purple interior. Freshly harvested.
icons.chainNote: Grown version of the corm — same purple-brown, much larger

icons.description: Taro root sliced and cooked, showing creamy purple-white interior. On a leaf plate. Light steam.
icons.chainNote: Same taro root, now sliced and cooked — show the purple-white flesh

icons.description: A small banana plant shoot with a couple of unfurling leaves. Bright green, fresh, compact.
A small hand of 3-4 bright yellow bananas. Tropical, cheerful. Classic banana shape and color.
icons.chainNote: The fruit produced by the shoot — bright yellow bananas

icons.description: A short woody stem cutting with a few broad leaves. Dark green leaves, brown stem with root nubs.
A round, bumpy-skinned green breadfruit. Tennis-ball sized, distinctive pebbled texture. Light green.
icons.chainNote: The fruit grown from the cutting — round, bumpy green

icons.description: Same breadfruit, now charred on outside, split open to show fluffy golden interior like bread. Steam rising.
icons.chainNote: Same breadfruit, fire-roasted — blackened skin, golden bread-like interior

icons.description: A moist reddish-brown clay lump, slightly glistening. Finger marks visible. Earthy, muddy.
A small coil-built pot, same reddish clay color. Still wet-looking, rough texture, slightly lopsided — handmade feel.
icons.chainNote: Same clay, now shaped into a pot — wet, unfired, rough

icons.description: Same pot shape as shaped_clay_pot but now hardened and orange-tan from firing. Harder look, slight sheen, kiln-darkened patches.
icons.chainNote: Same pot, now fired — harder, orange-tan, darkened patches

icons.description: Larger version of the pot with a lid/stopper. Same fired clay color but with visible resin seal around the rim. Storage vessel.
icons.chainNote: Bigger fired pot with a sealed lid — same clay, more refined

icons.description: A fired clay pot (matching fired_clay_pot style) with clear water visible inside, slight ripple. Blue water glint.
icons.chainNote: The fired pot filled with water — show blue water inside the pot

icons.description: A woven basket/bundle containing dried fish, wrapped food, and a sealed jar. Tied with cordage. Travel-ready.
A sharpened bamboo splinter lashed to a short handle with cordage. Green bamboo blade, pale handle. Crude but effective.
icons.use: Tool slot, required for fiber/food processing

icons.description: Long bamboo shaft with a fire-darkened, sharpened tip. Same bamboo green on shaft, blackened pointed end. Lashed binding near tip.
icons.chainNote: Same bamboo material but longer, with a fire-blackened hardened tip

icons.description: A small bow with cordage string, a wooden spindle, and a flat fireboard. Components arranged together. Warm wood tones.
A sturdy stick with fire-hardened pointed end. Similar to bamboo spear but thicker, shorter, meant for earth. Dark tip, wood shaft.
A palm-sized round stone, same grey as flat_stone but rounder and heavier-looking. Wear marks on striking surface.
A large shell (matching large_shell pink) lashed perpendicular to a wooden handle with cordage. Woodworking tool.
A polished stone blade (grey, matching stone_blade material) lashed to a wooden handle. Cordage binding visible. Serious tool.
icons.chainNote: Stone blade mounted on a handle — same stone color, now a complete axe

icons.description: A wicked-sharp obsidian blade, glossy black with razor edges. Same volcanic glass as obsidian resource but pressure-flaked into a blade shape. Slight purple sheen.
icons.chainNote: Same glossy black obsidian, now knapped into a refined blade shape

icons.description: A small double-pointed hook carved from shell, with cordage line attached. Simple but clever fishing implement.
A conical woven basket trap with funnel entrance. Made from bamboo strips and cordage. Open weave pattern visible.
icons.chainNote: A larger, more complex fishing tool — woven bamboo construction

icons.description: A thick-walled clay vessel, matching fired pottery color but with a pour spout. Heat-blackened interior. Squat, heavy form.
icons.use: Tool slot, enables advanced fire crafting
icons.chainNote: Same fired clay as pottery chain but shaped as a heavy crucible with pour spout

icons.description: An open hand reaching for a green leaf or small plant. Suggests gathering from nature. Warm skin tone, lush green plant.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A taut fishing line curving down to a small fish. Water splash droplets. Dynamic, action-oriented.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A piece of wood with curling shavings and a tool edge visible. Focus on the craftsmanship — smooth cuts, wood grain.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: Two hands tying cordage around assembled materials. The universal 'making things' gesture. Warm, active.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A clay pot sitting over orange flames with steam rising. Cozy, warm campfire cooking feel.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A close-up of a woven pattern — palm fronds or fibers in a criss-cross weave. Texture-focused, showing the craft.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A simple A-frame shelter structure made of sticks and palm fronds. Small but recognizable as building.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A small green sprout emerging from dark tilled soil. Fresh, hopeful. Two small leaves unfurling.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A stylized Polynesian star compass or wave pattern. Celestial navigation feel — stars above, waves below.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A circle of stones around burning sticks. Orange flames, smoke wisp. Cozy, essential. Small scale.
An upgraded campfire — same stone ring concept but taller, with flat cooking stones. More permanent, more structured.
icons.chainNote: Same fire concept but built up with more stone, more permanent

icons.description: A dug-out earth pit with glowing coals and clay pots inside. Covered partially with palm fronds. Orange glow from below.
A beehive-shaped clay kiln with an opening showing interior glow. Same clay color as pottery. Smoke rising from top vent.
icons.chainNote: Evolution of firing pit — enclosed clay structure, more controlled fire

icons.description: A low dome-shaped mound of clay-sealed earth with small vent holes. Thin wisps of smoke escaping from vents. Darker, earthier than the pottery kiln — more industrial.
icons.chainNote: Separate from pottery kiln — lower, wider mound shape for slow-burning logs into charcoal

icons.object: Small fired clay slab with etched task marks
icons.description: A palm-sized terracotta clay tablet with scratched tally marks and task symbols. Fired hard in a pit, edges slightly rough. Simple planning aid — a castaway's first to-do list.
icons.chainNote: Thematic precursor to charcoal board — simpler planning tool from fired clay

icons.description: A flat, sun-bleached piece of driftwood propped upright with charcoal scrawled task lists and tally marks. Simple but purposeful — a castaway's planning board.
icons.chainNote: Thematic link to charcoal kiln — uses charcoal as writing material

icons.description: A simple lean-to shelter with palm frond thatch roof, items piled underneath. Basic but functional storage.

icons.object: Stone-walled tidal pool with trapped fish
icons.description: A small natural rock pool reinforced with stacked flat grey stones, shallow turquoise water inside with a couple of small fish and a crab visible. Driftwood braces along the edges. Rough, natural-looking stonework.
A simple wooden frame with horizontal bars, items (fish, fibers) hanging to dry. Sun rays hitting it.
A big woven basket with lid. Tight weave pattern visible. Same material look as basket_trap but larger, rounder.
A sturdy A-frame rack made from driftwood and bamboo, with logs and branches leaning against it. Keeps lumber dry and organized.
A round clay jar with a fitted lid, sealed with clay slip. Slightly taller than a fired clay pot. Keeps food fresh.

icons.object: Bamboo storage shelf with clay pots
icons.description: A simple bamboo shelf rack with several fired clay pots and jars arranged on it. Organized, tidy. Keeps supplies off the ground and sorted.
A section of bamboo stake fence tied with cordage. Sturdy, territorial. Shows protection and permanence.
A rectangular bamboo frame with taut fiber strings (warp). Some woven rows visible. Functional, rustic.
A wide bamboo frame staked into the ground with ropes, broader than the fiber loom. Partially woven pandanus mat visible on the frame. Sturdy, practical.
A small raft of lashed-together logs with a basic mast/sail. Bobbing on blue water. Simple, hopeful.
A sleek single-hull dugout canoe with outrigger. Same wood tone as shaped_hull. On the water, ready to voyage.
icons.chainNote: Evolution of raft — carved from a single log, much more refined, with outrigger

icons.description: A small square of tilled dark earth, cleared of vegetation. Stakes marking corners. Fresh, ready for planting.
Same plot as cleared_plot but now with small green sprouts in rows. A few leaves visible. Progress.
icons.chainNote: The cleared plot now with growing plants — same earth, add green sprouts

icons.description: A lush, productive garden plot with mature plants, taro leaves, banana plant visible. Bamboo stakes and cordage supports.
icons.chainNote: Full evolution — same plot now lush and productive with mature plants

icons.description: A small stone-ringed well with a simple bamboo crossbar and rope. Blue water visible below. Cool, refreshing.
Golden sand beach with turquoise water lapping. A few shells and driftwood. Bright, inviting, starting zone feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: A cluster of 2-3 coconut palms with brown coconuts visible in the crowns. Dappled sunlight, green understory.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: Dark volcanic rocks with tide pools between them. Wet, glistening. Small crabs and shells visible.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: Tall green bamboo stalks, dense and vertical. Filtered green light. Peaceful, productive feeling.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: Thick jungle canopy with vines, broad leaves, and filtered golden light. Mysterious, deeper island. Darker greens.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: A small volcanic island seen across blue water. Dark peak with green slopes. Clouds around summit. Horizon adventure feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, biome headers, discovery toasts

icons.description: An open hand reaching down to pick something up. Active, purposeful. Warm skin tone against transparent bg.
A hammerstone striking downward with motion lines. Impact moment. Dynamic, productive.

A small green seedling with two leaves pushing up from a mound of dark earth. A subtle woven basket trap outline in the background. Represents passive stations: farm plots, traps, orchards — things you set and tend.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar, visible when stations unlocked

icons.description: A simple shelter frame silhouette — two sticks leaning together with a crossbar. Iconic, minimal, recognizable.
A stylized compass with N/S/E/W points. Polynesian-inspired design. Navigation and discovery.
A small woven pouch or bag tied with cordage. Slightly open showing items inside. Matches island craft aesthetic.
A glowing star or ascending sparkle pattern. Warm amber glow matching accent color. Achievement, growth.
Two curved arrows forming a circular loop, suggesting repetition and automation. Warm amber tones with subtle bamboo texture. Conveys queued, repeating work — the player's daily routine.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar, visible when routines unlocked (any skill reaches level 15)

icons.description: A curved golden sickle mid-swing through a sheaf of ripe grain. Warm amber tones, a few loose grain kernels scattering. Suggests abundance and agricultural mastery — the mainland evolution of bare-handed gathering.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar on mainland screen, replaces Gather icon

icons.description: A dark iron anvil with a hammer resting on top, orange-hot metal sparks flying. Ember glow underneath suggesting a forge fire. Represents advanced mainland crafting — metalwork, smelting, and industrial production.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar on mainland screen, replaces Craft icon

icons.description: A wooden ship's wheel overlaid with a four-pointed compass star. Ocean blue-cyan tones with gold compass points. Conveys ambitious voyages and trade — the mainland evolution of island exploration.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar on mainland screen, replaces Explore icon

icons.description: A round wooden shield with a short sword crossed behind it. Warm bronze and leather tones — sturdy, battle-worn. Represents the player's equipped gear: weapons, armor, and trinkets.
icons.use: Bottom tab bar on mainland screen, visible when player has equipment

icons.description: A coconut shell or carved wood gear — organic take on the settings cog. Not metallic. Island-crafted feel.
A small scroll or folded bark-cloth sheet with scratched markings. Island journal/log book.
A heart shape made from small shells or shell beads. Warm, decorative. Matches the morale/comfort theme.
A bare footprint in sand — discovery, exploration. Used for biome discovery notifications.
An upward-pointing arrow or chevron with sparkle. Skill level gain notification.
A small burst or sparkle pattern — something new was made. Crafting completion notification.
A small palm-frond flag or banner on a stick. Building completion notification.
A small tropical island seen from slight distance — sandy beach ring, 2-3 palm trees, blue ocean surrounding. Warm, inviting, home-base feel. Golden sand, lush green palms, turquoise water.

A coastline with rocky cliffs and hills stretching inland. More dramatic and adventurous than the island — exposed stone, windswept trees, a path leading inward. Cool grey-blue cliffs, muted greens, hints of ore-red in the rock.
A short pandanus stem cutting with a few spiky leaves sprouting from the top. Fresh green, fibrous base where it was cut. Looks like a small tropical seedling ready to plant.
A small bundle of long, broad pandanus leaves — bright green with fine serrated edges and a central midrib. Slightly fanned out, tied loosely at the base.
A single pandanus leaf, now stiff and pale tan/cream colored from sun-drying. Curled slightly at the edges, with visible parallel veins. Lighter and more brittle than the fresh version.
icons.use: Inventory, recipe input for cutting strips

icons.description: Several thin, uniform strips cut from dried pandanus leaf. Pale golden-tan, flexible and ready for weaving or braiding. Neatly bundled.
icons.use: Inventory, recipe input for rope and sail

icons.description: A coil of sturdy braided rope made from pandanus strips. Golden-brown, tightly twisted with visible braid pattern. Thicker and stronger than cordage.
icons.use: Inventory, recipe input for outrigger canoe and other maritime builds

icons.description: A triangular woven sail made from pandanus strips, folded loosely. Pale cream with a warm golden tint, visible weave texture. A few reinforcing cordage ties along the edges.
icons.use: Inventory, recipe input for outrigger canoe

icons.description: Three or four pandanus plants clustered together, with their distinctive prop roots and spiraling crowns of long spiky leaves. Lush green with a tropical feel.
A flat rectangular mat made from overlapping palm fronds and dry grass, laid on sand. Rustic, slightly rumpled. Sandy muted tones — the most basic bed.
A woven fiber hammock strung between two palm tree trunks (only trunks visible at edges). Natural tan/green cordage in an open weave pattern, gently sagging in the middle.
A small A-frame or lean-to hut with bamboo pole frame and thick palm-thatch roof. Dark opening at the front, warm amber light spilling out. Tropical and sturdy.

A carved dugout canoe with a bamboo outrigger float on one side, connected by cross-beams. A small triangular pandanus sail is raised. Ocean blue-cyan tones, salt-weathered wood. The culmination of all maritime skills.
icons.use: Settlement panel, vessel tier 3, triggers voyage phase

icons.object: Outrigger canoe on open ocean at sunrise
icons.description: An outrigger canoe with a raised sail silhouetted against a tropical sunrise. Golden-orange sky reflected on calm ocean waters. A sense of freedom and accomplishment. Wider composition than standard icons.
A bundle of pandanus fibers darkened and softened from water soaking. Darker golden-brown than dried pandanus, visibly wet and limp. A few water droplets clinging to the fibers.
icons.use: Inventory, recipe input for splitting into strips

icons.description: A shallow rectangular pit lined with smooth clay, filled with murky water. Bundles of pandanus fiber visible submerged inside. Flat stones around the rim. Earthy tones with blue-green water.
A thick flat stone disc mounted on a short bamboo axle, with a shaped clay pot forming on top. The stone is grey-blue, the clay pot warm amber. Motion blur or slight radial lines suggesting spinning.

icons.object: Crescent-shaped stone fish trap in shallows
icons.description: A curved wall of stacked grey stones partially submerged in shallow turquoise water. Fish visible inside the crescent. Stones are rough and natural-looking, arranged in a half-moon shape that narrows at the opening.
icons.use: Settlement panel, building card, station icon

icons.description: A folded piece of rough, tawny-brown animal hide with visible fur texture on one side and pale flesh on the other. Edges are uneven and ragged. Warm sun-bleached tones with natural creases.
icons.use: Inventory, expedition drops, curing recipe input

icons.object: Cured leather piece, smooth and dark
icons.description: A neatly cut piece of dark brown cured leather, supple and smooth. Slight sheen from smoke-curing. Edges are clean-cut, ready for stitching. Darker and more refined than raw hide.
icons.use: Inventory, hide armor crafting recipes, repair material

icons.description: A rough, reddish-orange nugget of native copper with a dull metallic sheen. Irregular shape with hints of green patina on edges. Warm, sun-lit metal against transparent background.
icons.use: Inventory, mainland resource drops, smithing recipes

icons.description: Two crossed weapons — a wooden spear and a small round shield — forming an X. Warm tropical wood tones with wrapped fiber grips. Slight battle-worn scratches.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A rough chunk of green-streaked copper ore (malachite). Deep green with bright copper-red veins showing through fractured surfaces. Earthy and mineral.
icons.use: Inventory, mining rewards, smelting recipe inputs

icons.description: A flat rectangular bar of pure smelted copper. Bright reddish-orange with a warm metallic sheen. Clean cast shape with slight hammer marks on the surface.
icons.use: Inventory, smithing recipe inputs, crafting material

icons.description: A cluster of dark brown-black cassiterite pebbles with a vitreous lustre. Small, rounded stones with faint crystalline facets catching the light.
icons.use: Inventory, mining rewards, bronze smelting input

icons.description: A small silvery-white bar of smelted tin with a soft sheen. Slightly uneven surface from hand-casting in a crucible. Lighter in color than copper or iron ingots.
icons.chainNote: Smelted from tin ore, alloyed with copper ingot to produce bronze

icons.description: A flat bar of golden-brown bronze alloy. Harder and more lustrous than copper, with a warm amber-gold tone. Slight patina beginning at the edges.
icons.use: Inventory, smithing recipe inputs, advanced crafting

icons.description: A dense chunk of hematite iron ore. Deep red-brown with darker streaks and a rough, earthy texture. Heavy and substantial.
icons.use: Inventory, mining rewards, iron smelting input

icons.description: A rough, spongy mass of crude iron fresh from the bloomery. Dark grey with glowing orange-red cracks where slag seeps through. Irregular, porous shape.
A hammered bar of wrought iron. Dark silver-grey with a matte finish and visible grain from repeated folding. Strong and utilitarian.
icons.use: Inventory, smithing recipe inputs, advanced equipment crafting

icons.description: A gleaming bar of carburized steel. Bright silver with a blue-grey tint and mirror-like polish on the flat faces. The pinnacle of metalworking.
icons.use: Inventory, late-game smithing, top-tier equipment crafting

icons.description: A sturdy bamboo table covered with hand-drawn coastal charts marked in charcoal. Rolled-up maps, rope coils, and a charcoal stick rest on the surface.
A squat clay-walled shaft furnace with leather bellows attached. Wisps of smoke and orange glow from the top opening. Stone base with charcoal residue.
A stone pickaxe embedded in a cracked rock face with small ore chunks flying off. Warm amber handle with grey stone head. Sparks at the impact point.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.description: A stone hammer resting on a flat anvil stone with a glowing orange-hot metal piece between them. Sparks scattered around. Warm firelit tones.
icons.use: Skills panel, action cards, milestone badges

icons.object: Eroded sea cliffs with mineral veins
icons.description: Tall weathered sea cliffs with exposed layers of green and brown mineral veins. Crashing waves at the base, tropical sky above. Rocky ledges with sparse vegetation.
Gently rolling hills of red laterite soil with scattered tropical trees. Exposed rock outcrops showing iron-rich deposits. Warm golden sunlight.

icons.object: Pile of fine grey-brown ancient stone dust
icons.description: A small mound of fine powdery dust with faint sparkles, scraped from crumbling ancient stonework. Grey-brown with hints of ochre. A few tiny stone fragments mixed in. Looks dry and old.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Coastal Ruins — permanently adds +5 defense to one equipment item

icons.object: Cluster of blue-white crystallized sea salt
icons.description: Chunky crystals of sea salt with a faint blue-white glow, formed deep in tidal caves. Translucent with angular facets. Looks cold and wet, with a slight brine sheen.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Tidal Caves — permanently adds +7 wetResist to one equipment item

icons.object: Glob of thick amber-gold caustic tree sap
icons.description: A viscous drop of dark amber sap, still sticky and warm. Faint wisps of smoke or steam rise from its surface. Looks corrosive and dangerous — the kind of thing that burns through anything.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Overgrown Trail — permanently adds +5 offense to one equipment item

icons.description: A dense, faceted crystal with a warm rose-pink inner glow. Pulled from deep quarry rock. Looks heavy and solid, with a faint pulse of warmth visible through its translucent surface.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Flooded Quarry — permanently adds +15 life to one equipment item

icons.object: Shard of permanent pale blue ice
icons.description: A jagged shard of ice that never melts, pale blue and crystal clear. Faint frost particles drift from its edges. Cold white glow from within. Looks impossibly cold.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Ridge Pass — permanently adds +7 coldResist to one equipment item

icons.object: Petrified stick of ancient temple incense
icons.description: A short stick of petrified incense, dark grey with golden veining. Faint wisps of pale smoke curl from the tip despite being stone-solid. Looks ancient and unyielding.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Sunken Temple — permanently adds +5 endurance to one equipment item

icons.description: A razor-sharp sliver of volcanic obsidian that radiates visible heat. Dark black glass with glowing red-orange veins like lava. Faint heat shimmer around it. Looks dangerously hot.
icons.use: Imbuing reagent from Volcanic Rift — permanently adds +7 heatResist to one equipment item

icons.description: A long bamboo shaft with a fire-blackened, sharpened tip. The point is darkened and glossy from heat treatment. Lashed binding near the tip with dried fiber cordage.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 0 balanced weapon

icons.description: A rough, heavy stone lashed to a pale driftwood handle with cordage. The stone head is dark grey and crudely shaped. Bindings wrap tightly where stone meets wood. Brutal, primitive feel.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 0 heavy weapon

icons.description: A razor-sharp obsidian blade bound to a bamboo grip with cordage. The blade is glossy black with a slight purple sheen and wickedly sharp edges. Short and nimble-looking.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 0 speed weapon
icons.chainNote: Same glossy black obsidian as obsidian_blade but shorter, bound to a handle as a combat weapon

icons.description: A crude vest woven from rough plant fiber and dried fiber strips. Tan and green tones, loose weave visible. Looks handmade and practical — not pretty but functional.
icons.use: Equipment body slot, Tier 0 body armor

icons.description: Strips of dried plant fiber wound tightly around shin and calf shapes. Layered bindings in tan and pale green. Simple, protective wrapping with visible cord ties.
icons.use: Equipment legs slot, Tier 0 leg armor
icons.chainNote: Same dried fiber material as vest but wrapped into leg protection

icons.description: Simple sandals with split bamboo soles and fiber lashing straps. Green-tan bamboo base with rough fiber ties. Practical island footwear.
icons.chainNote: Same bamboo and fiber materials shaped into simple footwear

icons.description: A small round shield woven from layered bamboo strips with a fiber handle on the back. Green-tan bamboo weave in a circular pattern. Light and compact.
icons.chainNote: Same bamboo strips woven into a defensive shield shape

icons.description: A bamboo shaft with a hammered copper spearhead bound tightly with cordage. The copper tip has a warm reddish-orange glow with slight green patina at the edges. Clear step up from the fire-hardened version.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 1 balanced weapon

icons.description: A large copper axe head mounted on a bamboo haft with double cordage binding. The copper blade is wide and heavy with warm orange-copper sheen. Imposing and brutal.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 1 heavy weapon
icons.chainNote: Same copper material as spear but shaped into a heavier axe head

icons.description: A round shield with a hammered copper face over a bamboo frame. Warm copper surface with visible hammer marks and slight dents. Riveted copper disc over woven bamboo backing.
icons.chainNote: Same hammered copper as weapons but shaped into a defensive shield face

icons.description: A proper chest piece made from layered dried fiber panels stitched with cordage. Darker tan than the woven vest, thicker and more structured. Visible stitching lines.
icons.use: Equipment body slot, Tier 1 body armor

icons.description: A close-fitting cap made from layered dried fiber, shaped to cover the head without blocking vision. Dark tan with visible stitch lines. Snug, practical headgear.
icons.chainNote: Same layered dried fiber as hide_armor but shaped into a fitted cap

icons.description: Leg-covering panels of layered dried fiber stitched together with cordage. Same dark tan material as hide_armor, fitted to the leg shape. Stitching runs along the sides.
icons.use: Equipment legs slot, Tier 1 leg armor
icons.chainNote: Same layered dried fiber as hide_armor but cut and stitched for legs

icons.description: Ankle-high boots stitched from dried fiber with bamboo-reinforced soles. Dark tan fiber upper with visible green bamboo sole plate. Sturdy lacing up the front.
icons.chainNote: Same dried fiber as hide_armor with bamboo sole — upgrade from sandals

icons.description: A leaf-shaped bronze blade with a bamboo-wrapped grip. The blade has a warm golden-brown sheen with sharp edges catching the light. Elegant and deadly. Classical Mediterranean inspired shape.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 2 balanced weapon

icons.description: A large round shield cast in solid bronze with a central boss. Golden-brown surface with concentric ring decoration. Heavier and more imposing than the copper shield.
icons.chainNote: Same bronze alloy as sword but cast into a heavy defensive shield

icons.description: A bronze helmet with cheek guards and a slight ridge crest. Golden-brown metal with visible casting texture. Covers the head and sides of the face. Ancient warrior feel.
A torso-shaped bronze breastplate with raised muscle contours. Golden-brown with hammer marks visible in the metal. Thick and formidable. Leather straps visible at shoulders and sides.
icons.use: Equipment body slot, Tier 2 body armor
icons.chainNote: Same bronze as helm but shaped into chest protection

icons.description: A straight double-edged iron blade with a leather-wrapped grip. Dark grey metal with a slight bluish sheen. Longer and harder than bronze — a serious weapon. Simple crossguard.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 3 balanced weapon

icons.description: A round wooden shield faced with wrought iron plates. Dark grey metal riveted over wood with a central iron boss. Heavier and tougher than bronze shields.
icons.chainNote: Same wrought iron as sword but hammered into a shield face

icons.object: Riveted iron helmet with nasal guard
icons.description: A conical iron helmet with a prominent nasal guard and riveted plates. Dark grey metal with visible rivet heads. Norman-style design. Practical and imposing.
A torso armor of overlapping iron plates riveted to a leather backing. Dark grey metal scales with visible leather straps. Heavier than bronze but far more protective. Lamellar-inspired construction.
icons.use: Equipment body slot, Tier 3 body armor
icons.chainNote: Same iron as helm but layered into torso protection

icons.description: A pair of shaped iron shin guards strapped over leather. Dark grey metal contoured to the lower leg with buckle straps visible. Matched set feel with iron helm and cuirass.
icons.use: Equipment legs slot, Tier 3 leg armor
icons.chainNote: Same iron as cuirass but shaped into leg protection

icons.description: Thick leather boots with iron toe caps and heel plates riveted on. Dark grey iron over brown leather. Rugged and built for rough terrain.
icons.chainNote: Leather boots reinforced with same iron as the rest of the armor set

icons.description: A long straight steel blade honed to a mirror edge. Bright silvery metal with a keen edge catching the light. Leather-wrapped grip with a steel pommel. The finest weapon a castaway could forge.
icons.use: Equipment weapon slot, Tier 4 endgame weapon

icons.description: A kite-shaped shield of polished steel with a tapered bottom point. Bright silvery metal with a central boss and border rivets. Imposing and near-impenetrable.
icons.use: Equipment offhand slot, Tier 4 endgame shield
icons.chainNote: Same polished steel as sword but shaped into a kite shield

icons.description: A full-face steel helmet with a ventail and eye slits. Bright silvery metal with articulated cheek plates. The most protective headgear possible. Crusader-inspired design.
icons.use: Equipment head slot, Tier 4 endgame headgear

icons.description: A full torso armor of articulated steel plates shaped to the body. Bright silvery metal with visible articulation joints. The finest armor a castaway could forge. Imposing and masterfully crafted.
icons.use: Equipment body slot, Tier 4 endgame body armor
icons.chainNote: Same polished steel as helm but articulated into full torso protection

icons.description: Articulated steel plates shaped to the leg with knee cops. Bright silvery metal with visible hinges for mobility. Full leg protection without sacrificing movement.
icons.use: Equipment legs slot, Tier 4 endgame leg armor
icons.chainNote: Same steel as cuirass but articulated into leg protection

icons.description: Masterwork boots with articulated steel plating over leather. Bright silvery steel plates with visible rivets over dark leather. Full foot protection with surprising mobility.
icons.use: Equipment feet slot, Tier 4 endgame footwear
icons.chainNote: Leather boots plated with same steel as the rest of the armor set

icons.object: Footprints leading along a sandy shoreline
icons.description: Bare footprints in golden sand curving along the waterline. Gentle turquoise waves lapping at the trail. Shells and driftwood scattered near the prints. Bright, inviting, easy exploration feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list

icons.description: A narrow trail disappearing into thick green jungle foliage. Cut vines hanging at the entrance. Dappled golden light filtering through the canopy. Deeper and more mysterious than the beach.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Deeper exploration — same island, denser foliage than beach

icons.object: Small raft on open water approaching an island
icons.description: A crude log raft with a simple sail on cyan-blue ocean water. A dark volcanic island silhouette on the horizon. White-capped waves. Sense of short but daring voyage.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: First sea voyage — small raft, close island visible

icons.object: Dugout canoe on deep blue sea
icons.description: A carved dugout canoe cutting through deep blue ocean waves. Paddle visible. Distant island chain on the far horizon. More confident, longer-range voyage than the raft.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Longer voyage — larger boat, open water, distant islands

icons.object: Outrigger canoe with full sail on the open ocean
icons.description: A sturdy outrigger canoe with a woven sail billowing in trade winds. Deep ocean swells, dramatic cloud formations. A faint line of land on the far horizon — the mainland. Epic, triumphant feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list, victory expedition
icons.chainNote: The final voyage — largest vessel, open ocean, mainland ahead

icons.object: Crumbling stone archway on a shore
icons.description: A weathered stone archway half-buried in sand and coastal grasses. Crumbling walls with vines growing through cracks. A feral boar silhouette in the shadows. Ancient, overgrown ruins feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list

icons.object: Sea cave entrance with tide pools
icons.description: A dark cave mouth in wet volcanic rock with tide pools at the entrance. Green-streaked copper veins visible inside. Waves splashing against the rocks. Slippery, dangerous, rewarding feel.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Wet hazard cave — same coast as ruins but underground

icons.object: Faint jungle path with heat shimmer
icons.description: A barely visible trail through dense tropical vegetation. Heat shimmer rising from the ground. Claw marks on a tree trunk hint at predators. Oppressive, sweltering jungle atmosphere.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Mid-tier heat/wildlife expedition — deeper inland

icons.description: An ancient quarry with toppled stone pillars half-submerged in murky green water. Dark tin ore glints beneath the surface. Eerie, flooded ruins atmosphere.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Mid-tier wet/terrain expedition — flooded underground

icons.object: Narrow mountain ridge path in wind
icons.description: A narrow rocky ridge path with wind-swept clouds streaming past. Exposed cliff face with red-brown iron ore veins. Snow and frost on the higher rocks. Cold, exposed, dramatic landscape.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Mid-tier cold/terrain expedition — exposed mountain ridge

icons.object: Half-collapsed stone temple descending into darkness
icons.description: A moss-covered stone temple sinking into the jungle floor. Carved steps descend into shadow. Faint orange torchlight glows from within. Ominous guardian silhouette at the threshold. Ancient and dangerous.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: High-tier endurance/combat expedition — ancient temple dungeon

icons.object: Jagged volcanic rift venting sulfur and heat
icons.description: A jagged crack in dark volcanic rock with orange-red lava glow and sulfurous yellow-green steam venting upward. Extreme heat shimmer distorting the air. The most dangerous and rewarding expedition.
icons.use: Expedition panel, queue icon, venture list
icons.chainNote: Highest-tier heat expedition — volcanic endgame zone

icons.object: Carved wooden pulley on bamboo axle
icons.description: A small carved hardwood wheel mounted on a bamboo axle with cordage threaded through. Warm wood tones, visible grain. Practical and sturdy-looking.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up construction recipes

icons.object: Simple log sled with bamboo runners
icons.description: Two parallel wooden runners lashed to bamboo crossbeams with rope. Rough, practical, meant for dragging heavy logs. Scuff marks on the runners.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up tree felling

icons.description: A small copper blade with a greenish-orange sheen, bound to a bamboo grip with cordage. Slightly irregular hammered surface. Warmer and softer-looking than stone tools.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up fiber and plant processing
icons.chainNote: First metal cutting tool — copper era

icons.object: Cast bronze axe on hardwood haft
icons.description: A heavy bronze axe head with a warm golden-brown patina, mounted on a sturdy bamboo handle. Lashed with cordage. Visibly heavier and more refined than the stone axe.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up wood felling and processing
icons.chainNote: Bronze-era upgrade to stone axe — same shape language but metal head

icons.description: A dark iron pick head forged to a point, mounted on a sturdy haft. Dark grey metal with slight hammer marks. Practical and heavy-looking.
icons.chainNote: Iron-era mining tool — first proper pickaxe

icons.description: A polished steel pick head with a bright gleam, mounted on a leather-wrapped haft. Sharper and more refined than iron. Slight blue-grey steel sheen.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up mining further
icons.chainNote: Steel-era upgrade — shinier, sharper version of iron pickaxe

icons.description: A sleek steel blade with a bright, keen edge, wrapped in cured leather at the grip. Clean lines, slight reflective gleam. The finest cutting tool.
icons.use: Tool slot, speeds up fiber processing and hide curing
icons.chainNote: Steel-era upgrade to copper knife — sharper, broader utility

icons.object: Shallow drainage trench dug around a camp edge
icons.description: A freshly-dug earth channel curving past a shelter corner, loose dirt piled along one side. A large shell rests at the trench edge as the digging tool. Muddy, sun-warmed earth — hard-labor feel.
icons.use: Queue/active action icon for the build-panel labor action (no drops)

icons.object: Hands re-tying cordage lashings on a bamboo shelter frame
icons.description: Close-up of weathered hands repairing a palm-thatch shelter — tightening fiber cordage around bamboo poles, tucking loose thatch back into place. Warm tropical light, worn tools beside.
icons.use: Queue/active action icon for the camp-maintenance recipe (no resource output)
